steps.title: Use the continued-use clue
steps.content: Caldwell continues to use Apollo's data to study long-term effects on the Moon. That means the scientific value of the missions did not end when the landings ended.

steps.title: Choose the still-continuing word
steps.content: B means first or initial, C means replaced or pushed aside, and D means disputed. The needed word describes value that is still active because researchers continue to use the data. The answer is A.
